creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes, it would be preferable if we could get it in before 2024Q1
I'm taking about formats in terms of capatility and efficientcy, it's not like png have a rock solid history if that's what you're trying to imply. https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvekey.cgi?keyword=libpng
